desc: Returns the revision state for a target ViewSheet.
summary: Returns the revision state for a target ViewSheet. Resolves the sheet by sheetNumber or sheetId parameter. Returns sequence, date, description, and issued flag for each revision. Useful for QA checks before issuing or printing sheets.
usecase: User wants to check which revisions are on a specific sheet. QA review before issuing a sheet for construction. AI needs revision data to verify sheet compliance.
notfor: Adding revisions to sheets (use AddRevisionToSheetCommand). Creating new revisions (use CreateRevisionCommand). Listing all sheets (use list_sheets MCP tool).
precondition: Active document must be open. The target sheet must exist (by number or ID). At least one revision must exist in the document.
postcondition: Result JSON stored in LastQueryResult with sheet info and ordered revision list. No model modifications — read-only query.

outputs.name: Result
outputs.description: Sheet revisions summary with sequence, date, description, issued flag
